'''鈭歱-n-n-g''' ('''kapannegoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:naturize|naturize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-n-n-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:naturize|naturize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歱-n-n-g
|-
! Lemma
| kapannegoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipanegoko|thipanegoko]] || [[word:jipanegoko|jipanegoko]] || [[word:shipanegoko|shipanegoko]] || [[word:kipanegoko|kipanegoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupanegoko|thuthupanegoko]] || [[word:jujupanegoko|jujupanegoko]] || [[word:shushupanegoko|shushupanegoko]] || [[word:kukupanegoko|kukupanegoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopanegoko|thopanegoko]] || [[word:jopanegoko|jopanegoko]] || [[word:shopanegoko|shopanegoko]] || [[word:kopanegoko|kopanegoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙panegoko|th忙panegoko]] || [[word:j忙panegoko|j忙panegoko]] || [[word:sh忙panegoko|sh忙panegoko]] || [[word:k忙panegoko|k忙panegoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
